facade_axis_note: West facade: local x = -world y (local x increasing = world southward); local y = world z

scale_origin.note: this image's local origin = northwest ground corner on the west facade

strokes.note: west facade third-floor wall band including parapet zone

unknowns_noted: no printed level or height dimensions are visible on this elevation
elevation y coordinates are image-derived from the shared facade pixel scale using the known 8.00 m facade width
uncaptured_visual_elements: facade outline coincides with wall_fill edges and is not traced as a separate outline stroke
storey divider lines at z approximately 3.60 m and 7.20 m are used to split wall_fill bands but are not legal pen strokes
window frame outlines are collapsed to window rects
